# tanev.design — llms.txt
> One person. Custom websites, brand, motion and SEO.
> Plovdiv, Bulgaria — working worldwide.

## What this site is

Stoyan Tanev is a solo web designer and developer. Services: web design, web
development, brand identity, motion, SEO. Hand-coded; no page builders. One
brief, one set of hands, start to finish. Reply within 24 hours.

## Services

- Web design — direction, layout, type, motion. Editorial, not template.
- Web development — React, TypeScript, GSAP, Vercel. Hand-coded.
- Brand identity — marks, type system, palette, lockup.
- Motion — loops, transitions, micro-interactions.
- SEO — technical SEO and AI-search optimisation: schema, sitemap, llms.txt, Core Web Vitals.

## Process

1. Brief — fill the form. Reply within 24 hours with a rough plan.
2. Direction — one direction, fully resolved before any code.
3. Build — pixel-precise, animated, fast. Tested across devices.
4. Launch — site goes live. Client owns source, hosting and assets.
